settings.heading: Processing
settings.text: Orders are packed carefully before dispatch. Processing times, available shipping methods and delivery estimates are shown at checkout.

settings.heading: Tracking
settings.text: Where tracking is available, your tracking details will be sent after the order leaves BREADBOX.

settings.heading: Address accuracy
settings.text: Please check your shipping address before placing an order. If an address needs to be changed, contact us as soon as possible before the order is packed.

settings.heading: Delays
settings.text: Delivery times can vary during busy periods or because of carrier delays. If your order has not arrived after the estimated window, contact us with your order number.

settings.heading: Packed carefully. Sent clearly.
settings.intro: Here is how BREADBOX orders are prepared, shipped and tracked.
